name: netforge
description: Browser automation engine for Hesi — control Chrome/Edge from any agent via CDP
author: Hesi NetForge

mcpServers.name: netforge-browser
mcpServers.description: CDP-based browser server (navigate, screenshot, click, type, evaluate JS)

aiTools.name: netforge_browser_navigate
aiTools.description: Navigate browser to a URL and return the page title

aiTools.name: netforge_browser_screenshot
aiTools.description: Take a screenshot of the current browser page (base64 JPEG)
